source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An undulator consists of a linear periodic array of magnets of alternating polarity. Each repeat unit in the array of magnets has length $d$ and there are $N$ such units. An electron of speed $v(v \text{sim} c)$, passing through this undulator, travels a path with only small deflections, as shown in Fig. 3.5. The motion of the electron along this path produces radiation which is most intense at a certain fundamental frequency corresponding to a wavelength $\text{lambda}$. If the velocity of the electrons differs from the speed of light by 1 part in $10^{6}$, calculate the wavelength of the radiation produced by an undulator with $d=10 \text{cm}$.
extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL object representation rather than a file path or URL

issues: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL object representation rather than a file path or URL

image_dependency: 题干显式引用“Fig. 3.5”并描述电子路径“as shown in Fig. 3.5”
输入字段标注 requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false
但题干也给出了关键物理量 d=10 cm 和速度偏离 c 的数量级，说明图片可能更偏辅助示意而非唯一信息源
multi_step: 需要把“速度比光速慢 1 part in 10^6”转化为可计算的物理量
需要结合 undulator 的周期长度 d 与电子/辐射相位关系求基本波长
答案为数值近似量，通常涉及至少两步以上的物理建模与计算，而非直接读取
verifiability: answer_type=short_text，标准答案是明确的近似数值加单位
题目给定了主要已知量，结果可通过已知 undulator 基本波长关系独立复算
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true，题干与答案资产均已登记存在

risk_flags: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL object representation rather than a file path or URL
答案为近似值短文本，后续核验需要设置数值容差与单位归一化

decision_reasons: 题干、答案与主图像资产均已登记存在，核心语义支撑完整
综合打分较高，尤其可核验性强，适合进入候选池
虽存在 metadata.image_paths 记录格式异常，但已有有效图像文件清单，风险主要是元数据层面
